arts.ttl: Manchester Utd might have wildcard solution to replace Amad after devastating injury blow
arts.sum: Amad has confirmed a long-term injury in a blow to Man United, with Ruben Amorim needing to find a solution

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo confirms Man United fans' worst fears after injury bombshell as star breaks his silence with 46-word social media message
arts.sum: As Mail Sport exclusively revealed, Diallo was hurt in training this week and is still being assessed, but he is expected to be out for at least two months and may not play again this campaign.

arts.ttl: Teddy Sheringham says Man Utd must solve major problem - despite player he 'quite likes'
arts.sum: It's been a disappointing star to his Manchester United tenure for boss Ruben Amorim and only four sides have scored fewer goals than the Red Devils in the Premier League this term

arts.ttl: Vital Man United ace “extremely disappointed” and confirms he’s out injured “for some time”
arts.sum: In a shattering blow for both player and club, Man United’s brilliant winger, Amad Diallo, has confirmed that he’ll be out injured for some time. arts.sum: Manchester United boss Ruben Amorim has suffered a major blow after Amad picked up an ankle injury in training that could see him miss the remainder of the campaign

arts.ttl: Has Ruben Amorim made Man United worse? JAMES SHARPE examines the system that players are questioning and finds an alarming conclusion for fans
arts.sum: JAMES SHARPE: Amorim is only 20 games into his reign but, as Mail Sport revealed this week, some of his players are already wondering whether a change of plan might be in order.

He has been accused of lacking ambition and some of his major decisions have been questioned by the fans and the media as well. arts.ttl: Man United could be missing 10 players against Tottenham as attacker suffers potential 'season-ending injury'
arts.sum: Manchester United allegedly suffer a devastating injury blow over key attacker Amad Diallo, who could miss the remainder of the 2024-25 season with an ankle problem.
